title: dioscorea humilis subsp. humilis
intro: Dioscorea humilis subsp. humilis, also known as wild yam, is a perennial vine native to the Americas, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea humilis subsp. humilis include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and arthritis, as well as improved immune function and reduced stress levels. Dioscorea humilis subsp. humilis is often prepared as a root extract or dried root, and can also be found in capsule or tincture form, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
